title: SQLancer crash on coalesce
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2) VALUES (5, TRUE), (10, FALSE), (15, NULL);
SELECT COALESCE(t1.c2, t2.c3 > 1.00) FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.c1 = 10;
key_bug_features: coalesce function with boolean and numeric comparison
